name: Brown Rice Vegetable Pulao
tagline: Whole-grain pulao with mixed vegetables — slow carbs, fiber, magnesium

hero.alt: Brown rice pulao with mixed vegetables and whole spices in a wide vessel
hero.caption: brown rice pulao — whole-grain, vegetable-loaded

steps.title: Bloom the spices
steps.detail: Heat ghee in a heavy pot. Add bay leaf, cinnamon, cloves, cardamom, and cumin — let them sizzle 30 seconds. Add onion, cook till golden. Stir in ginger-garlic paste, then the vegetables. Cook 4 minutes.
steps.tip: Whole spices are non-negotiable for pulao — ground masala makes it taste like vegetable rice.

steps.title: Add rice and water
steps.detail: Drain the soaked brown rice and tip into the pot. Toast 2 minutes. Pour in 3.5 cups hot water and salt. Bring to a vigorous boil.
steps.tip: Hot water = no temperature drop = rice cooks evenly.

steps.title: Simmer covered
steps.detail: Reduce heat to lowest, cover with a tight lid, cook 35 minutes without lifting. Off heat, rest 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork. Serve with raita.
steps.tip: Lifting the lid breaks the steam cycle — peek only at the very end.

healthFacts: Brown rice has 2× the fiber and 3× the magnesium of polished white rice.
Lower glycemic load — slower glucose curve, longer satiety.
Manganese, B1, and phosphorus all hit double-digit DV per cup cooked.
Mixed vegetables add vitamin A, K, C, and antioxidant variety.
